title: LunariePropHunt
body:
# Prophunt Modpack

Dive into an exciting hide-and-seek experience with our small **Prophunt Modpack**! This modpack is specifically designed for Minecraft fans looking for a fun and thrilling multiplayer game. Players take on the role of either a hunter or a prop, experiencing rounds filled with strategy, stealth, and action.

## Features
- **Prophunt Mechanics**: Hide as mobs and entities, while trying to evade the hunters!
  - **Shrink**: You can also adjust your size with our custom *Shrink Device*
- **Lightweight Mods**: Designed for smooth performance, even on lower-end PCs.
- **Easy Installation**: Quick and hassle-free setup via CurseForge.
- **Customizable Settings**: Adjust your gameplay experience with the included mods.
- **Perfect for Friends**: Ideal for small servers or LAN parties.

Enjoy thrilling rounds with your friends, test your hiding skills, and find out who is the ultimate hunter!

Download the modpack now and start your ultimate Prophunt adventure in Minecraft! 🎮

---

> **Note**: This modpack requires **Minecraft Fabric** and is optimized for version *1.20.1*. Installation and setup instructions can be found in the description.
